checks.describe: etcdctl exec'd into the etcd static pod reads an always-present /registry key (default/kube-root-ca.crt)
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --endpoints=https://127.0.0.1:2379 --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key get /registry/configmaps/default/kube-root-ca.crt --keys-only

checks.describe: etcdctl endpoint status returns JSON with a positive header revision
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --endpoints=https://127.0.0.1:2379 --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key endpoint status -w json

checks.describe: a fresh snapshot save inspected with etcdutl reports revision > 0 (file removed afterwards)
checks.run: kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --endpoints=https://127.0.0.1:2379 --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key snapshot save /var/lib/etcd/m3-check.snap && kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdutl snapshot status /var/lib/etcd/m3-check.snap -w json; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- rm -f /var/lib/etcd/m3-check.snap

checks.describe: after compacting to the current revision, a watch from below the compaction floor fails with the compacted-revision error (the storage-layer face of 410 Gone)
checks.run: REV=$(kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --endpoints=https://127.0.0.1:2379 --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key endpoint status -w json | grep -o '"revision":[0-9]*' | head -1 | grep -o '[0-9]*'); kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --endpoints=https://127.0.0.1:2379 --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key compact ${REV} 2>&1; kubectl --context kind-kubeadv-core -n kube-system exec etcd-kubeadv-core-control-plane -- etcdctl --endpoints=https://127.0.0.1:2379 --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/server.key watch /registry/namespaces/default --rev=1 2>&1
